text: I feel a quiet expectancy here, much like the atmosphere itself. In the first scene, the empty, softly-lit corridor welcomes me with a promise of something to come, gentle yet uncertain. The bottle in my hand grounds me in this moment of stillness. The second scene feels intimately immediate—someone's hand brushes close, drawing my attention from anticipation to presence, from waiting to connection. I feel strangely comforted by these simple, subtle moments.
